refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall analyze the worksite area to identify terrain features, obstacles, and work-zone boundaries, and represent these elements in a comprehensive worksite model/map.
refined_fr.rationale: The original FR is broad; decomposing it clarifies the distinct functional aspects: terrain analysis, obstacle detection, and work-zone representation, which are critical for planning and operational safety.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Verify by comparing generated worksite maps against ground truth data from site surveys and sensor inputs, ensuring all key features are accurately represented.
sub_frs: FR1: Analyze terrain features of the worksite area.
FR2: Detect and characterize obstacles within the worksite.
FR3: Represent work-zone boundaries and operational areas in the model.

candidate_dps: DP1: Use multi-sensor data fusion algorithms combining LIDAR, camera, and GPS data for terrain and obstacle analysis.
DP2: Implement a geospatial database and mapping framework to represent and update the worksite model.
DP3: Develop a modular software pipeline for feature extraction, classification, and model generation.
selected_dp.selected_dp: DP1: Use multi-sensor data fusion algorithms combining LIDAR, camera, and GPS data for terrain and obstacle analysis.

potential_sources: Data dependencies between terrain and obstacle analysis modules
coupling_check.notes: The selected DP logically separates sensing and analysis from representation, minimizing coupling. Interfaces are well-defined for data handoff.

assumptions_risks: Assumes availability and reliability of sensor data streams.
Risk of sensor data inconsistency or loss impacting model accuracy.
High safety criticality requires robust error handling and validation.
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider explicit DP for work-zone boundary representation to reduce complexity in sensor fusion DP.

im_boundary.name: NGHE Solution
im_boundary.scope: Overall system responsible for integrating sensor data, performing analysis, and generating the worksite model.

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Receives sensor data streams (LIDAR, camera, GPS) from Vehicle and Teleoperation modules.

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Sends updated worksite model data to Vehicle and Teleoperation for planning and execution.

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Supports data exchange with remote systems and Teleoperation for real-time updates.

module_containment_scores.notes: Primary owner of worksite mapping functionality; high containment with low diffusion.
Provides raw sensor data but does not perform mapping; low containment, high diffusion risk if mapping logic placed here.
Uses mapping data but should not contain mapping logic to avoid duplication.
May consume mapping data for safety alerts but not responsible for mapping.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Centralizing worksite mapping in NGHE Solution module minimizes diffusion and supports clear ownership and safety-critical validation.
containment_risks: Potential performance bottleneck if all sensor data processing centralized.
Integration complexity with multiple sensor sources.
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Monitor performance and consider modular subcomponents within NGHE Solution for scalability.

fr_dp_gate.reason: The selected DP logically satisfies the refined FRs with clear mapping from terrain and obstacle analysis to sensor fusion algorithms.

diffusion_risks: Minimal risk as mapping logic is centralized in NGHE Solution module.
Avoids duplication across Vehicle and Teleoperation modules.
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Containment scores support NGHE Solution as the best architectural boundary for this DP.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification can be performed by testing the NGHE Solution module outputs against known site data and sensor inputs.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of functional requirements to NGHE Solution module with well-defined interfaces.

recommended_revisions: Refine DP to explicitly separate work-zone boundary representation.
Plan for modularization within NGHE Solution to handle performance and integration complexity.

decision.justification: While the decomposition and assignments are sound, the DP can be further refined to separate work-zone boundary representation for clarity and modularity.
next_level_sub_frs: FR1: Analyze terrain features of the worksite area.
FR2: Detect and characterize obstacles within the worksite.
FR3: Represent work-zone boundaries and operational areas in the model.

revise.why: To reduce complexity and improve modularity by explicitly separating work-zone boundary representation from sensor fusion algorithms.

assumptions: Sensor data availability and quality are sufficient for accurate mapping.
NGHE Solution module can handle integration and processing load.
open_risks: Sensor data inconsistencies impacting model accuracy.
evidence_needed: Performance benchmarks of NGHE Solution processing pipeline.
Verification test results comparing generated maps to ground truth.
